question_sets.name: Acute Findings
question_sets.description: Clinically actionable yes/no findings used in everyday radiology triage and screening. Each question is binary because the goal is to be able to aggregate counts and screen reports for review.

questions.label: Pulmonary embolism
questions.question: Is acute pulmonary embolism described in this report?

questions.label: Pneumothorax
questions.question: Is a pneumothorax (of any size) described in this report?

questions.label: Pleural effusion
questions.question: Is a pleural effusion described in this report?

questions.label: Pneumonia
questions.question: Are findings consistent with pneumonia or pulmonary infection described in this report?

questions.label: Acute intracranial hemorrhage
questions.question: Is an acute intracranial hemorrhage described in this report?

questions.label: Acute ischemic stroke
questions.question: Are findings of acute ischemic stroke or large vessel occlusion described in this report?

questions.label: Acute fracture
questions.question: Is an acute fracture described in this report?

questions.label: Suspicious mass
questions.question: Is a mass or lesion described that is suspicious for malignancy?

questions.label: Free intraperitoneal air or fluid
questions.question: Is free intraperitoneal air or free fluid described in this report?

questions.label: Critical follow-up recommended
questions.question: Does the report recommend urgent follow-up, urgent clinical action, or communicate a critical finding?
